name: Drunken Apple/Pumpkin Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup cooked pumpkin - mashed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat together the eggs and sugar until light.
2. Mix in the mashed pumpkin, applesauce, flour, salt, cinnamon, ginger, nutmeg, allspice, cloves, half-and-half (or evaporated milk), and vanilla; blend thoroughly.
3. Pour the mixture into the pie shell.
4. Arrange pecan halves over top of filling.
5. Bake at 425°F in the lower third of the oven for 20 minutes.
6. Reduce oven heat to 350°F and bake an additional 30 to 35 minutes, or until filling is firm and a knife inserted 1 inch from the edge comes out clean.
7. Cool on a wire rack.
8. At serving time, warm rum in a small container suitable for pouring.
9. Light the rum with a match and pour immediately while flaming over the pie.
Yield: Serves 6 to 8.
